articles.author: Josh Alper
articles.title: Fernando Mendoza on his Pro Day: I wanted to make sure my teammates could showcase themselves - NBC Sports
articles.description: Fernando Mendoza has been installed as the likely first overall pick of the 2026 NFL Draft for some time, so there wasn't much he could do at Indiana's Pro Day workout to improve his draft standing.
articles.content:
Fernando Mendoza has been installed as the likely first overall pick of the 2026 NFL Draft for some time, so there wasnt much he could do at Indianas Pro Day workout to improve his draft standing.
